prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-EMERGCARSET-50PC Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 50pc EMT Police Firefighter Emergency Rescue Diecast Toy Cars Playset with Floor Mat, Multicolor, Boys, Ages 3+ Description: Calling little ones with a need for speed. The Kidplokio EMT police, firefighter and emergency rescue-themed diecast car playset for kids comes with 50 different toy cars to choose from and an awesome city floor mat for hours of crime-fighting, firefighting and pretend play rescue adventures. A great value toy car playset that kids can use in conjunction with other car toys too. Designed with small hands in mind, these car toys are excellent models for little ones to develop their fine motor skills, dexterity and hand eye coordination while handling the race cars; and, not only are the toy cars great for kids physical development, the cars will encourage lots of imaginative cosplay and pretend play too, as they conjure up rescue missions around the city.

The 50pc diecast toy cars playset also comes with a 21 x 26 inch city map, so kids can drive the vehicles around town. Featured on the map are buildings including a school, police station, fire station, bus station, hospital and more. Family trips far away or neighbor next door play dates, the diecast toy cars are lightweight and easy to carry from one place to the next, without too much extra added weight or bulk; With vibrant colors and super cool decals, this car set will have little one's engines (and imaginations) revving, whether at home or on the go. Made from safe, high quality materials, so parents need not worry. Let the crime-fighting, firefighting rescue missions commence.

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: kids toy car race track set mini racing game speed racing car toys for boys Christmas toys stocking stuffer brother gifts fine motor toys hand eye coordination training toddler learning and education toys car accessories EMT cosplay pretend play Features: - 50PC DIECAST TOY CARS PLAYSET: Calling all little policemen, police women and firefighters in training! The Kidplokio EMT Police Firefighter Emergency Rescue Diecast Cars Playset comes with 50 different individual police and firefighter themed toy cars, toy trucks and an awesome urban city floor mat for hours of crime fighting and firefighting rescue missions! - FUN POLICE AND FIREFIGHTER TOY CARS THEME: With 50 different individual police and firefighter themed toy cars and toy trucks to choose from, kids won't know which toy car or toy truck to play with first! The playset features everything from police cars, rescue helicopters, road signs, firetrucks and more! - FINE MOTOR SKILLS TOYS: Designed with small hands in mind, these car toys for boys are excellent for little ones to develop fine motor skills and hand eye coordination; and, not only are handling and playing with the toy cars great for their physical development, the cars will encourage lots of imaginative cosplay too! - GREAT KIDS TOY FOR TRAVEL: For family trips far away or neighbor next door play dates, the diecast toys cars are lightweight and easy to carry from one place to the next; with vibrant colors and super cool decals, this car set will have little one's engines and imaginations revving whether at home or on the go! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 18.5 x 14 x 1 inches; Weight: 1.75lbs; Color: Multi; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Total Number of Pieces: 50; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 50pc Emergency Rescue Diecast Toy Cars Playset

tokens.name: Emergency Rescue Diecast Toy Cars Playset

openai.item_name: Kidplokio 50-pk Multicolor Diecast Toy Cars Playset

anthropic.title_differentiation: 50 Police And Firefighter Themed Cars, Includes City Floor Mat, Fine Motor Skills, Ages 3

openai.title_differentiation: Emergency Rescue Themes, 50 Piece Set, City Map, Police Firetruck Helicopter, Fine Motor Skills, Ages 3 Plus
